expectations.text: Explains both impact materiality (inside-out) and financial materiality (outside-in)
expectations.evidence: Clearly distinguishes impact materiality (inside-out) and financial materiality (outside-in)

expectations.text: Correctly states a topic is material if it meets EITHER criterion
expectations.evidence: States "A topic is material if it meets EITHER or both criteria" with ESRS 1 citation

expectations.text: Contrasts GRI (impact only) and TCFD (financial only) vs CSRD (both)
expectations.evidence: Side-by-side comparison: GRI=impact only, TCFD=financial/climate only, CSRD=both across all topics

expectations.text: Provides step-by-step DMA process with ESRS 1 reference
expectations.evidence: 8-step DMA process with ESRS 1 paras. 45-56, ESRS 2 IRO-1/SBM-3 citations

expectations.text: Mentions scale, scope, irremediability criteria for impact assessment
expectations.evidence: Scale × Scope × Irremediability formula explicitly stated with definitions
